creator: geraud@gcu.info
text:
While looking at the PR used to create the recent math/octave-forge-*
	I noticed that the submitter may have used an old port's Makefile as
	a template for the new ones. As such, the first two lines of each
	Makefile don't reflect reality (the port's name and creation date).

	I made a quick script and came up with a patch. There is no functional
	change.

	The maintainer and maho@ are CC'd.

Fix: See the following patch.
